system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

=== Episode ep_273 (day 343) ===
On day 338, under Longview, the planning exercise sets aside located_in(sector=sector_04, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_11) (fct_0807).
On day 338, in the Longview drill, located_in(sector=sector_04, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_21) is adopted as a working premise (fct_0808).

Nightferry, on day 343, has partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12, partner=partner_15, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_01) — noted as fct_0791.

=== Episode ep_253 (day 282) ===
On day 282, policy rul_022 ("restricted_in policy 1 (revised)", authority level 1, effective from day 282) states: IF supplies(partner=partner_08, customer=?A, sector=?D) AND registered_in(jurisdiction=?E, asset=?B) AND member_of(asset=?B, product=?G) THEN restricted_in(customer=?A, asset=?B), UNLESS located_in(sector=sector_04, jurisdiction=?E) OR located_in(sector=sector_15, jurisdiction=?E).
Notice sup_001, logged on day 282, records that policy rul_003 is superseded by policy rul_022, effective day 282; from that day, rul_003 no longer applies.

=== Episode ep_071 (day 32) ===
On day 31, partner_feed reports — reference fct_0530, effective from day 31 — that located_in(sector=sector_04, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_11).
An audit_note entry on day 31, recorded as fct_0726 and valid from day 31, shows registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_10, asset=asset_04).
registry_A records fct_0063 on day 32, in force from day 32, indicating registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_24, asset=asset_15).

=== Episode ep_221 (day 202) ===
On day 201, within the Longview exercise, notice sup_018 records that rul_039 supersedes rul_008 effective day 201; beyond Longview, rul_008 remains active.
registry_B reports on day 202 — reference fct_0731, valid from day 202 — that offered_in(partner=partner_05, asset=asset_00).

=== Episode ep_270 (day 332) ===
Logged on day 332, the partner_feed has a note, valid from day 332, that holds(asset=asset_06, product=product_05) — filed as fct_0502.
In The Second Auditor, day 332 has it that classified_as(sector=sector_19, product=product_17) (fct_0764).
Within the Longview exercise, as of day 332, the working premise is that offered_in(partner=partner_04, asset=asset_07) — recorded as fct_0818.

=== Episode ep_222 (day 203) ===
Under the Longview exercise, logged on day 203 and effective from day 203, policy rul_038 (“approved_for policy 2 (scenario-narrowed)”, authority level 3) provides: IF member_of(asset=asset_19, product=?A) AND registered_in(jurisdiction=?B, asset=asset_19) AND rated_as(partner=?C, customer=?E) THEN approved_for(product=?A, jurisdiction=?B, partner=?C), UNLESS supplies(partner=?C, customer=customer_19, sector=sector_24) OR rated_as(partner=?C, customer=customer_05).
partner_02’s day-203 note could not have been more over-the-top if it tried: “Oh sure, member_of(asset=asset_07, product=product_03) — obviously.”
Notice sup_017, filed for the Longview exercise on day 203, has rul_038 taking over from rul_009 as of day 203; outside Longview, the desk maintains rul_009.

=== Episode ep_231 (day 224) ===
A field_report entry logged on day 223 — reference fct_0489, effective from day 223 — confirms that holds(asset=asset_19, product=product_06).
registry_A, on day 223, records partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_15, partner=partner_14, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_10) under fct_0517, valid from day 223.
Also from registry_A on day 223, fct_0523 notes partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_11, partner=partner_00, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_15), in force from day 223.
Policy rul_026 ("approved_for policy 3 (revised)", authority level 1) was logged on day 224 and effective from day 224: IF classified_as(sector=sector_20, product=?A) AND partnered_with(jurisdiction=?B, partner=?C, jurisdiction2=?B) AND located_in(sector=sector_22, jurisdiction=?B) THEN approved_for(product=?A, jurisdiction=?B, partner=?C), UNLESS holds(asset=asset_12, product=?A) OR operates_in(partner=?C, asset=asset_01).

Logged on day 200, and in force from day 200, registry_A records as fct_0544 that rated_as(partner=partner_13, customer=customer_16).
The Second Auditor relates, as of day 200, that partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_03, partner=partner_06, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_16) — logged as fct_0769.
On day 200, the forecast filed by jurisdiction_00 under fct_0847 is borne out by observation fct_0544; the record therefore treats it as established from day 200, through notice prm_05.
registry_A, under fct_0475 effective day 201, has it that as of day 201, supplies(partner=partner_00, customer=customer_16, sector=sector_11) hold.
On day 201, within the planning exercise Longview, policy rul_039 ("approved_for policy 1 (scenario-narrowed)", authority level 5, effective from day 201) provides that if classified_as(sector=sector_09, product=?A) and registered_in(jurisdiction=?B, asset=?E) and partnered_with(jurisdiction=?B, partner=?C, jurisdiction2=?B), then approved_for(product=?A, jurisdiction=?B, partner=?C), unless partnered_with(jurisdiction=?B, partner=partner_03, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_06).
